CustomField.description: Specify the maximum cap for the MR Fund. This cap is checked each time MR utilization is reported. If the total MR balance (including the current period MR) reaches the cap, the MR amount for the current period will be adjusted.For example: If the cap is 1,000,000 and the current balance is 990,000, a utilization MR total of 150,000 will be adjusted to 10,000. Note: This cap adjustment applies only to MR utilization invoices.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Specify the maximum cap for the MR Fund. This cap is checked each time MR utilization is reported. If the total MR balance (including the current period MR) reaches the cap, the MR amount for the current period will be adjusted.For example: If the cap is 1,000,000 and the current balance is 990,000, a utilization MR total of 150,000 will be adjusted to 10,000. Note: This cap adjustment applies only to MR utilization invoices.
CustomField.label: Maintenance Reserve CAP
